payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Close-up of a lower dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and raised molding; glossy varnish with visible scuffs and small chips at the edges, right side of the door is cropped by the image; appears to be a lower cabinet near the floor, approximately 0.5 m from the camera.
